productDisplayName: Biba Women Off-White & Brown Printed Churidar Kurta with Dupatta
description: Off-white and brown printed churidar kurta with dupattaOff-white printed kurta, has a mandarin collar with a split V-neckline, placket and collar in brown with sequin detailing, pin tucks from the shoulders to the waist, short sleeves with brown fabric tape detailing at the hems and a mix-and-match print above the vented hemBrown churidar, has a waistband with a drawstring and is mildly pleated below the waist Brown dupatta
